| MasterRecordId | Master Record ID | reference |
| AccountId | Account ID | reference |

| OtherCountry | Other Country | string |

| OtherLongitude | Other Longitude | double |

| OtherAddress | Other Address | address |

| MailingCity | Mailing City | string |

| MailingLatitude | Mailing Latitude | double |
| MailingLongitude | Mailing Longitude | double |
| MailingGeocodeAccuracy | Mailing Geocode Accuracy | picklist |
| MailingAddress | Mailing Address | address |
| Phone | Business Phone | phone |
| Fax | Business Fax | phone |
| MobilePhone | Mobile Phone | phone |
| HomePhone | Home Phone | phone |
| OtherPhone | Other Phone | phone |
| AssistantPhone | Asst. Phone | phone |
| ReportsToId | Reports To ID | reference |
| Email | Email | email |
| Title | Title | string |
| Department | Department | string |
| AssistantName | Assistant's Name | string |
| LeadSource | Lead Source | picklist |
| Birthdate | Birthdate | date |

| OwnerId | Owner ID | reference |
| CreatedDate | Created Date | datetime |
| CreatedById | Created By ID | reference |
| LastModifiedDate | Last Modified Date | datetime |

| SystemModstamp | System Modstamp | datetime |

| LastViewedDate | Last Viewed Date | datetime |
